name: High-Visibility Safety Jacket
shortDescription: Class 2 retro-reflective jacket for yards, traffic and night work.
longDescription: Fluorescent polyester with retro-reflective tape banding, meeting Class 2 conspicuity for personnel working around moving plant, in loading yards and on night shifts. Available in vest and full-sleeve variants with optional printed site or contractor branding.

images.alt: High-Visibility Safety Jacket supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
